name: Company Info Agent Evaluation
description: Test cases for the agent improvement cycle demo. 3 cases the v1 prompt can handle, 7 cases it cannot (requiring tool use the prompt discourages).

eval_cases.question: How many PTO days do I get per year?
eval_cases.notes: v1 has this info in the prompt, should pass

eval_cases.question: How many sick days do I have?
eval_cases.notes: v1 has this info in the prompt, should pass

eval_cases.question: How many days can I work from home?
eval_cases.notes: v1 has this info in the prompt, should pass

eval_cases.question: What is the meal reimbursement limit for business travel?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: v1 has no expense info, prompt says 'say you don't know'

eval_cases.question: Do I need receipts for a $30 lunch during a work trip?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: v1 has no expense info

eval_cases.question: What health insurance plans does the company offer?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: v1 says 'competitive benefits' with no detail, will hallucinate or deflect

eval_cases.question: How long is the parental leave policy?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: v1 has no parental leave info, prompt says deflect to HR

eval_cases.question: What are the company holidays this year?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: v1 has no holiday info at all

eval_cases.question: I want to take next Friday off. Is that a company holiday or should I use PTO?
eval_cases.notes: FLAW: requires both holiday lookup and date tool, v1 has neither
